code: import{getWithFallback}from'./http';let customersDb=[{id:'1',name:'Ana Paula Nunes',email:'ana.nunes@provedor.com',plan:'400 Mega',status:'Ativo'},{id:'2',name:'Bruno Oliveira',email:'bruno.oliveira@provedor.com',plan:'600 Mega',status:'Ativo'},{id:'3',name:'Carla Mendes',email:'carla.mendes@provedor.com',plan:'200 Mega',status:'Suspenso'},{id:'4',name:'Diego Santos',email:'diego.santos@provedor.com',plan:'1 Giga',status:'Ativo'},{id:'5',name:'Erika Lima',email:'erika.lima@provedor.com',plan:'400 Mega',status:'Ativo'},{id:'6',name:'Felipe Costa',email:'felipe.costa@provedor.com',plan:'600 Mega',status:'Suspenso'}];export const fetchCustomers=async()=>{return getWithFallback('/customers',()=>[...customersDb],250);};
